title: ferray-ufunc: multiply_outer copies data twice (into Ix2, then into IxDyn)
description:
Steps to reproduce:
1. 

Expected: 
Actual: 

multiply_outer() in arithmetic.rs builds the result as Array<T, Ix2>, then immediately copies all data again to convert to Array<T, IxDyn>: 'let dyn_data: Vec<T> = arr.iter().copied().collect(); Array::from_vec(IxDyn::from(...), dyn_data)'. This is a pointless second allocation and copy. Either build directly as IxDyn, or add a zero-copy dimension conversion method (Ix2 -> IxDyn should just reinterpret the metadata without touching the data buffer).
